{{Relic Infobox|Bone Tea|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Upgrade|2}}
{{R|Bone Tea||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Tea Master|2}} event. After pickup, it will {{KW|Upgrade||2}} your starting hand at the start of the next combat.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Tea Master|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Bone Tea}} option and paying 50 Gold. 

== Interactions ==
=== Order ===
{{R|Bone Tea||2}} {{KW|Upgrade|Upgrades|2}} the hand after the {{R|Radiant Pearl||2}} creates {{C|Luminesce||2}}, but ''before'' the {{R|Fencing Manual||2}} {{KW|Forge|Forges|2}} (so {{C|Sovereign Blade||2}} will not be affected).

== Trivia ==

== Update History ==
